scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && npm run test:node && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:networking: npm run test:networking:owner && npm run test:networking:transport && npm run test:networking:client && npm run test:networking:server && npm run test:networking:combat
scripts.test:networking:transport: node --test tests/transport.test.js tests/net/message-router.test.js tests/net/network-join.test.js tests/net/connection-timing.test.js tests/net/runtime-state.test.js tests/server/room/room-socket.test.js tests/server/room/room-transport.test.js
scripts.test:networking:server: node --test tests/server/room/*.test.js tests/server/ws-identity.test.js tests/server/ws-lobby-upgrade.test.js tests/server/ws-upgrade.test.js tests/server/transport-server.test.js
scripts.test:networking:combat: node --test tests/shared/hitscan-authority.test.js tests/combat/hitscan-sync.test.js tests/net/feedback-sync.test.js tests/room-rewind.test.js tests/server/room/combat-service.test.js tests/server/room/room-combat-runtime.test.js
scripts.test:networking:full: npm run test:networking && npm run test:networking:integration
